name: goliath/wg-end-repair-cycle
title: Why Goliath – End the Repair Cycle
description: Grey band with two-column layout: left has heading, paragraphs, and bullet list; right has an orange callout box.

p1.default: The cost of the repair cycle is not determined by the first repair. It is measured by the cost of every repair after the first.

p2.default: Goliath™ was built to break the cycle.

p3.default: With our permanent upright repair solution:

default: No more recurring repair costs every time racking is damaged
No more disruption to your warehouse operations

callout.default: Once installed, Goliath™ continues to protect your racking forever, and we’re confident that if it were to be damaged by usual FLT damage, we will replace it for free.
